content_body: What a wonderful view, even coming in the middle of the night. Beautiful scenes, comfortable beds, and coziness by the numerous fires. The whole feel was so serene and a wonderful getaway from the hardships of the world. Will definitely come back and enjoy the views, hiking, food, and scenery. The beautiful, welcoming cabin made it so hard to leave. We had a wonderful family weekend. Thank you!
title: Hard to Leave!
